partner.notInMembership: not included in your Demat membership
partner.visitStore: visit the store to try it on — you only pay there

photos.tooLarge: that photo is over 8MB — please resize it and try again
photos.badType: photos must be jpeg, png, or webp

pdp.notice: partner item — not included in your Demat membership
pdp.holdBody: when you reserve, we authorise {amount} on your card — nothing is charged. the hold is released when you show up, and only captured if you don't.
pdp.comingSoon: reserving partner items is almost here — check back soon
pdp.payAtStore: you only pay at the store
pdp.notFoundBody: this partner item doesn't exist or is no longer listed.

directory.title: partner shops
directory.subtitle: independent local shops on Dematerialized — reserve online, try on in store, and pay only there
directory.comingSoonBody: we're teaming up with local stores you'll love. check back soon.

storefront.itemsEmpty: no items listed right now — check back soon.
storefront.errorTitle: we can't reach this shop right now
storefront.errorBody: the connection to our partner platform failed. please try again in a moment.

cart.title: your reservations
cart.empty: no items yet — reserve a partner item and it will show up here.
cart.holdDeposit: {amount} card hold when you reserve — nothing is charged
cart.holdTotal: we'll authorise {amount} in card holds — nothing is charged now

checkout.title: reserve your items
checkout.cardExplainer: to reserve, we keep a card on file. some items carry a small hold that is only authorised — nothing is charged unless you don't show up.
checkout.cardOnFile: we'll use this card for reservation holds — you only pay in the store.
checkout.cardSyncing: we're confirming your card with our payment provider — this usually takes a moment.
checkout.setupCancelled: card setup was cancelled — you can try again whenever you're ready.
checkout.termsIntro: each shop asks you to accept its terms before you reserve.
checkout.termsNone: {name} hasn't published terms for this reservation — nothing to accept here.
checkout.staleNotice: some terms changed since you last looked — please review and accept the current version.
checkout.holdAuthorise: we'll authorise a {amount} hold on your card for this item — nothing is charged
checkout.holdWindow: your items stay reserved for you for 7 days
checkout.payInStore: you try on and pay in the store — reserving costs nothing today.

activity.title: your partner items
activity.signinTitle: sign in to see your partner items
activity.signinText: your reservations, rentals and purchases at partner shops all live here.
activity.emptyText: reserve something at one of our partner shops and it will show up here.
activity.holdNote: {amount} hold on your card — only captured if you don't show up
activity.cancelBody: {title} goes back on the shelf and the hold on your card is released.

errors.item_unavailable: this item was just reserved by someone else
errors.stale_terms: the shop's terms changed — please accept the current version
errors.card_required: we need a card on file before you can reserve
errors.max_items: you can reserve up to 10 items at a time
errors.already_in_cart: this item is already in your reservations
errors.network: connection error — please check your internet and try again
errors.generic: something went wrong — please try again
